invisible.desc: If enabled, the server will not appear in the in-game server browser. Players must join using the ServerID printed to the console at startup.

password.desc: Set the join password for your server. Maximum 8 characters (leave blank for none).

players.desc: Maximum number of simultaneous players. Hard cap is 15, this cannot be exceeded.

port.desc: UDP/TCP port the server will bind to.

query_port.desc: Query port for server listing, recommended as game port +2.

region.desc: Region the server reports as, e.g. eu, us, usw.

world_guid.desc: The GUID of the world to load (the part after the ~ in the world folder name, e.g. MyIsland~7b52ef0c-8c71-4d05-bac5-415e57c1fcb0 -> use only 7b52ef0c-8c71-4d05-bac5-415e57c1fcb0). CAUTION: if this does not match an existing world folder, the server will crash on launch.

world_url.desc: Direct download link to a zipped default world folder. Required on first install since Sunkenland's server cannot generate a world itself. Leave blank only if you already have a world in place from a previous install.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/sunkenland && until [ -f /tmp/sunkenland/Sunkenland-DedicatedServer.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2667530 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2667530 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/sunkenland +login anonymous +app_update 2667530 validate +quit; box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/sunkenland +login anonymous +app_update 2667530 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/sunkenland/Sunkenland-DedicatedServer.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/sunkenland/. . && rm -rf /tmp/sunkenland'

sh -c 'mkdir -p "./wineprefix/drive_c/users/sunkenland/AppData/LocalLow/Vector3 Studio/Sunkenland/Worlds"; for f in *.zip; do [ -f "$f" ] && unzip -o "$f" -d "./wineprefix/drive_c/users/sunkenland/AppData/LocalLow/Vector3 Studio/Sunkenland/Worlds/"; done'

run.command: sh -c 'id -u sunkenland >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m sunkenland || adduser -D sunkenland; mkdir -p /home/sunkenland/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/sunkenland/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/sunkenland/.steam/sdk64/; fi; if [ -d ./wineprefix ]; then mkdir -p /home/sunkenland/.wine; cp -rn ./wineprefix/. /home/sunkenland/.wine/ 2>/dev/null || true; fi; chown -R sunkenland:sunkenland . /home/sunkenland/.steam /home/sunkenland/.wine 2>/dev/null; PASS_FLAG=""; if [ -n "${password}" ]; then PASS_FLAG="-password ${password}"; fi; VIS_FLAG=""; if [ "${invisible}" = "true" ]; then VIS_FLAG="-sessionInvisible true"; fi; exec runuser -u sunkenland -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/sunkenland/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./Sunkenland-DedicatedServer.exe -nographics -batchmode -worldGuid ${world_guid} -region ${region} -maxPlayerCapacity ${players} -port ${port} -queryport ${query_port} ${PASS_FLAG} ${VIS_FLAG}'
